purpose: Retained audit trail for source sequences rejected before final delivery.

candidates.reason: DAVIS has no foreground annotation in frames 60 and 62-74, so continuous pixel-level ground truth and tracking QA cannot be guaranteed.
candidates.retention: The briefly extracted source directory was removed before generation; setup and decision logs remain under SAM2_video.

candidates.reason: Vehicle, driver, and pusher are distinct DAVIS objects. Moving only the largest vehicle object left interacting people behind and produced unacceptable ProPainter smearing.
candidates.retention: Rejected source, masks, inpainting frames, logs, and QA previews are retained under data/sources/soapbox, work/soapbox, logs, and reports for transparency; no soapbox file is a final deliverable.
